info.title: Data Products
info.description: This API area comprises a set of APIs designed for use by Data Products. It includes sub-areas such as: segment ingestion and customer data synchronization

subdomain.description: SAP Customer Loyalty Management server URL where the application is deployed.

post.description:
Ingests a segment. If the segment ID already exists, it will be updated.
Otherwise, a new segment will be created. Customers can be added or removed from the segment.

requestBody.description: Request body containing segment details and customer assignments

createSegment.summary: Create a new segment with customers

value.name: High Spenders
value.description: Customers who spend more than $1000 per month

value.name: High Spenders
value.description: Customers who spend more than $1000 per month

401.description: Unauthorized. Invalid or missing authentication token.

error.message: Workspace not found with the specified id

post.summary: Creates or updates a retail store for a brand within a workspace
post.description:
Creates or updates a retail store for a brand within a workspace.
If a store with the same externalReference already exists, it will be updated with the new data.

requestBody.description: Retail store to create or update

200.description: Store ingested successfully - The store has been created or updated successfully

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing authentication token

404.description: Not Found - Workspace or brand not found

get.description: Retrieves a paginated list of rewards available for a specific Sales Organization. API consumers integrating from SAP systems can fetch available rewards using their Sales Organization ID. Use the `expand` query parameter to include additional related data.

parameters.name: expand
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of related resources to expand in the response. Supported values: `categories` (includes full category hierarchy as an array of names).

results.name: Free Coffee Voucher
results.description: Redeem for a free coffee at any participating store

results.name: Free Coffee Voucher
results.description: Redeem for a free coffee at any participating store

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing authentication token

404.description: Not Found - Workspace or sales organization not found

error.message: Brand not found with salesOrganizationId: SO12345

parameters.name: expand
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of related resources to expand in the response. Supported values: `categories` (includes full category hierarchy as an array of names).

post.summary: Creates or updates products for a brand within a workspace
post.description:
Bulk creates or updates products for a brand within a workspace.
This operation is all-or-nothing: if any product is invalid, the entire request fails.
If a product with the same productId already exists, it will be updated with the new data.

Multiple Products.description: Example with multiple products including physical and digital items

products.name: Digital Gift Card $50
products.description: Redeemable gift card for online and in-store purchases

Single Product.description: Minimal example with a single product

202.description: Products ingested into CLM successfully but will take up to 24 hours to be available for POS interactions.

post.summary: Creates or updates product prices for a brand within a workspace
post.description:
Bulk creates or updates product prices for a brand within a workspace.
This operation is all-or-nothing: if any product price is invalid, the entire request fails.

requestBody.description: Product prices to create or update

Single Price.description: Minimal example with a single price

202.description: Product prices ingested into CLM successfully but will take up to 24 hours to be available for POS interactions.

details.message: Base price must be a valid decimal number with up to 2 decimal places

post.summary: Creates or updates product groups for a brand within a workspace
post.description:
Creates or updates product groups for a brand within a workspace.
This operation is all-or-nothing: if any product group is invalid, the entire request fails.
If a product group with the same identifier already exists, it will be updated with the new data.

requestBody.description: Product groups to create or update

Hierarchical Product Groups.description: Example with parent and child product groups showing category hierarchy

productGroups.name: Coffee
productGroups.description: Coffee products including beans, ground, and instant

productGroups.name: Tea
productGroups.description: Tea products including loose leaf and bags

Single Product Group.description: Minimal example with a single product group

202.description: Product groups ingested into CLM successfully but will take up to 24 hours to be available for POS interactions.

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing authentication token

404.description: Not Found - Workspace or brand not found

IngestSegmentInput.description: Single segment payload for create or update

id.description: The source systems id for the segment. Used as the external reference to match existing segments for updates.

name.description: The name of the segment. Must be unique within a workspace.

description.example: Segment for customers who spend more than $1000 per month

brands.description: The list of brand salesOrganizationIds to restrict this segment to. If empty, the segment applies to all brands.

addedCustomers.description: The list of customerIds to be added to this segment.

removedCustomers.description: The list of customerIds to be removed from this segment.

code.description: Technical code for the detailed error

message.description: User-friendly message that describes the error
message.example: Not a valid attribute for this club

target.description: Data element or resource path related to the error

code.description: Technical code of the error situation

target.description: Data element or resource path related to the error

details.description: Nested error details for complex error scenarios

IngestRetailStoreInput.description: Request for creating or updating a retail store

name.description: Store name. Must be unique within the brand and at least 2 characters.

externalReference.description: The id of the store in the source system. If a store exists with this id, the details will be updated.

Localization.description: Localized content for a specific language

LocalizationContent.description: Translated text fields for a promotion, journey, or reward

name.description: Localized name, or empty string if not translated for this language

description.description: Localized description, or empty string if not translated for this language

count.description: Number of items in current page

RewardCost.description: Cost information for redeeming the reward. Can be fixed or tier-based.

TierCostEntry.description: Cost entry for a specific tier

Availability.description: Availability and scheduling information for the offer

HoursOfDay.description: Time range during the day when the offer is active

Limitation.description: Time-based limitations for when the offer is active

productId.description: The product SKU or UPC depending on the CLM brand configuration

IngestProductsInBulkInput.description: Request to create a batch of products

products.description: The list of products to be created in batch.

prices.description: The list of product prices to ingest

productId.description: The product SKU or UPC depending on the CLM brand configuration

IngestProductGroupsInBulkInput.description: Request to create a batch of products groups

productGroups.description: The list of products to be created in batch.

tags.name: Products
tags.description: Public API for ingesting products into CLM

x-sap-shortText: Allows master data ingestion and resource access
